activated_rules.rule_name: Pro forma invoice accepted as valid verification document
Consignee verified via delivery address because no primary billing field is shown

consignor.invoice_value:
ERICSSON AB
Torshamnsgatan 21-23
S-164 83 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: The certificate consignor is explicitly stated as ERICSSON AB in Sweden. The pro forma invoice header identifies ERICSSON AB as issuer with a Stockholm, Sweden address. Company name matches directly after standard case normalization, and the country is explicitly Sweden in both documents.

consignee.certificate_value:
KCELL JSC
ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51
050004 ALMATY
KAZAKHSTAN
consignee.invoice_value:
DELIVERY ADDRESS :
KCELL JSC
ALIMZHANOVA STREET 51, 050004
ALMATY, KAZAKHSTAN
consignee.motivation: The certificate consignee KCELL JSC, Alimzhanova Street 51, 050004 Almaty, Kazakhstan is explicitly identifiable in the invoice delivery address block. No separate primary billing field is shown, so verification through the delivery address is permitted. Company name and country match directly.

goods_description.certificate_value:
42 PACKAGES
TELECOM EQUIPMENT
PL - AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs
PL - AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs
goods_description.invoice_value:
Telecommunication Equipment:
...
AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs / Приемопередатчик AIR 3258 B78V и Коды аппаратной активации
...
AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs / Приемопередатчик AIR 3258 B78V и Коды аппаратной активации
goods_description.motivation: The certificate describes telecom equipment and specifically lists 'AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs' twice. The invoice contains the same identity-bearing product string in two line items. The broader wording 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' versus 'Telecommunication Equipment' does not prevent verification because the specific product designation is explicitly present in the invoice.

quantity.motivation: The certificate box 7 states gross weight 5298,000 KG. The invoice shows total gross weight as 5 298,000 and again as 5.298,000 kg. After allowed formatting normalization of separators, the numeric value and unit match exactly.

origin.invoice_value:
COUNTRY OF ORIGIN
PL
PL
...
Country of Origin: mentioned above
origin.motivation: The certificate origin is PL. The invoice contains an explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' column and both relevant goods lines are marked PL. The origin is therefore explicitly identifiable in the invoice as required.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points are verifiable against the attached pro forma invoice. Consignor, consignee, goods description, gross weight, and origin all match under the allowed rules and normalizations. No LC exception applies and no blocking readability issue was identified.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla relevanta uppgifter i ursprungscertifikatet kan verifieras mot den bifogade proformafakturan. Avsändare Ericsson AB, mottagare KCELL JSC, varubeskrivningen AIR 3258 B78V and HWACs, bruttovikten 5 298,000 kg och ursprungslandet PL återfinns i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan därför godkännas automatiskt.
